name: mpp-payments
description: Machine Payments Protocol (MPP) by Stripe + Tempo. Session-based streaming micropayments for agents. Superset of x402 with fiat+crypto hybrid via SPTs.

capabilities.session_payments: Authorize spending limit upfront, stream micropayments continuously — no per-tx overhead
capabilities.hybrid_fiat_crypto: Shared Payment Tokens (SPTs) enable cards + stablecoins + BNPL in one flow
capabilities.stripe_integration: PaymentIntents API — fraud detection, tax, refunds, reporting built-in
capabilities.tempo_settlement: 10K+ TPS, sub-second finality, no native gas token, fees in stablecoins
capabilities.x402_compat: Stripe supports both MPP and x402 — can run both in parallel
capabilities.agent_billing: Per-API-call, per-session, subscription, and streaming payment models

comparison_x402.x402_strengths: Permissionless, no vendor, chain-agnostic (Base, Polygon, Solana), open middleware
comparison_x402.mpp_strengths: Sessions (batch settlement), fiat+crypto hybrid, Stripe compliance, Visa support
comparison_x402.recommendation: Use BOTH — x402 for decentralized services, MPP for Stripe-integrated business models

rules: DOF supports both x402 AND MPP — not mutually exclusive
x402 track remains for Synthesis hackathon (Coinbase track)
MPP adds revenue capability via Stripe for post-hackathon monetization
Session-based payments reduce on-chain tx count by 10-100x
All payment events logged to JSONL for governance audit
